mapper.select: SELECT ITEM.ITEM_NO AS itemNo , ITEM.ITEM_NAME AS itemName , MIN(ITOP.PRICE) AS price , ITEM.ITEM_STATUS AS itemStatus , IMG.IMG_URL AS imgUrl , COUNT(DISTINCT ORD.ORDER_NO) AS orderCount FROM ITEM ITEM JOIN ITEM_CATEGORY_MAPPING ITCP ON ITCP.ITEM_NO = ITEM.ITEM_NO LEFT JOIN ITEM_OPTION_GROUP ITOG ON ITOG.ITEM_NO = ITEM.ITEM_NO LEFT JOIN ITEM_OPTION ITOP ON ITOP.GROUP_NO = ITOG.GROUP_NO LEFT JOIN ITEM_IMAGES IMG ON IMG.ITEM_NO = ITEM.ITEM_NO AND IMG.PRIMARY_YN = 'Y' LEFT JOIN ORDER_DETAIL ORD ON ORD.ITEM_NO = ITEM.ITEM_NO WHERE ITCP.CATEGORY_NO IN ( SELECT CATEGORY_NO FROM ITEM_CATEGORY_MAPPING WHERE ITEM_NO = #{itemNo} ) AND ITEM.ITEM_NO != #{itemNo} AND ITEM.ITEM_STATUS = 'ACTIVE' AND ITEM.DELETED_DT IS NULL GROUP BY ITEM.ITEM_NO, ITEM.ITEM_NAME, IMG.IMG_URL ORDER BY orderCount DESC LIMIT 10
